summary_en: 1,500,000 shares (11.01% of shares outstanding) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 at ¥379/share (closing price 2026-05-21), aggregate cap ¥568.5M, single execution window 2026-05-22 08:45 JST, rationale: capital efficiency and flexible capital policy execution.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 21 May 2026, the board of DAISUI CO.,LTD. (TSE Standard, ticker 7538) authorised a single-day share buyback block to be executed on 22 May 2026 at 08:45 JST via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading. The company will purchase up to 1,500,000 shares at ¥379 per share (the 21 May closing price), with an aggregate cap of ¥568.5 million. This represents 11.01% of issued shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The block trades on a filling-order basis matching seller bids at the fixed price; execution is limited to this single trading window and may be partial or null depending on market conditions. The stated rationale is to enhance capital efficiency and enable flexible capital policy execution in response to changing business conditions.
